description:
We are hiring a Staff Backend Engineer to lead our distributed systems work.

You will design and build services in Rust and Python that process millions of events per second.

lists.content:
• Design and own backend services from scratch
  • Lead architecture decisions for the data platform
  • Mentor senior engineers

• 8+ years of backend experience at scale
  • Strong Rust or Python
  • Deep knowledge of distributed systems
  • Experience with Kafka, gRPC, Kubernetes
